firma.title: Company-Settings
firma.subtitle: Studio identity, users and roles
firma.savedOk: Saved. This profile is now active.
firma.labelVatRateLocal: Local VAT % (EU) — rate for domestic invoices in EU region
firma.hintBanks: Company can have multiple accounts. Per BiH rules there must be exactly one primary account (radio).
firma.accountEmptyHint: If all fields are empty, account #{{n}} will not be saved.
firma.saveHint: Saving creates a new profile record and makes it active. The previous active one is deactivated (no deletion). Bank accounts are linked to the new active profile.
firma.brojacHint: Set the last issued invoice number before using Fluxa (once per year). From then on Fluxa takes over — the next invoice will get n+1.
firma.brojacErrorZadnji: Last number must be 0 or greater.
firma.logoHint: PNG, JPG or SVG, max {{max}} MB. Shown on invoice.
firma.fiskalIntro: Settings are per active company. When you have the device, enter URL, API key and PIN here; connection testing per documentation can be done later.
firma.fiskalHintApiPath: Empty = request to root (/). For PU standard enter /api/v3/invoices.
firma.fiskalHintYid: If the device expects an identifier in the header; can be left empty.

mobile.metaDescription: Fast budget in negotiations — simplified mobile version

cash.title: Cash
cash.subtitle: Signal layer (append-only, DRAFT). Does not affect bank/ledger.
cash.noTalents: No talents available. Check that talents are active in the system.
cash.noSuppliers: No suppliers available. Check that suppliers are active in the system.

deals.title: Deals list
deals.noDeals: No deals for the given filters.

dealDetail.quoteTitle: Prepare quote (discount, names, grouping) then save and preview.
dealDetail.closeReadOnlyTitle: Deal is read-only because project has a locking status.
dealDetail.closeTitle: Close project (soft-lock) and prepare for invoicing.
dealDetail.dealReadOnly: Deal is read-only (project status locks it)
dealDetail.confirmStornoDeal: Are you sure you want to reverse this Deal?
dealDetail.closePopoverMeaning: This means: project moves to CLOSED status (soft-lock) and is ready for invoicing.
dealDetail.understandContinue: I understand and want to continue
dealDetail.budgetSnapshotNote: Budget is already snapshotted in the project. Changes here do not automatically update the existing project.
dealDetail.deadlineFormatError: Deadline must be in format: dd.mm.yyyy (or dd.mm.yyyy HH:mm for manual time).
dealDetail.deadlineOnlyMattersHint: * This is the only deadline that matters for opening the project and priorities.
dealDetail.scStrategicCoreTitle: Quick budget via SC Strategic Core®
dealDetail.unsupportedFx: Some items use a currency we cannot convert yet. They are not included in the budget until we add exchange rates.
dealDetail.eurFxNote: EUR is converted at a fixed rate. We will formalize this with an exchange rate table later.
dealDetail.stornoItemTitle: Reverse line item (hidden from total, not deleted)
dealDetail.confirmStornoItem: Reverse this line item? (It will be hidden and excluded from the total.)
dealDetail.bannerAlreadyProject: This Deal has already become a project.
dealDetail.bannerSnapshot: Budget and line items in the project are snapshotted.
dealDetail.bannerArchive: Deal is history because the project is ARCHIVED.
dealDetail.bannerClosed: Deal is locked because the project is CLOSED (8).
dealDetail.bannerNotPrimary: Changes here are no longer the source of truth.

projectDetail.profitSignalTitle: Remainder (studio profit from %) + profit from margin (allowed budget − costs) = total
projectDetail.readOnlyMessage: Project is invoiced (status: Invoiced). Changes are no longer allowed.
projectDetail.readOnlyGuard: Project is invoiced (read-only). Actions are disabled.
projectDetail.ownerBudgetTitle: Owner: budget percent visible to team

fazePage.masterDeadlineHint: — phases without a specific deadline use this date.
fazePage.noPhases: No phases. Add the first phase above.
fazePage.errDeadlineAfterProject: Phase deadline must not be after project deadline ({date}).
fazePage.errEndAfterProject: Phase end date must not be after project deadline ({date}).
fazePage.noPhasesForTimeline: No phases with dates for timeline. Enter start and end dates in phases.

finalOkModal.title: FINAL OK
finalOkModal.intro: This means: production is finished. The project moves to status Completed (without locking) and is ready for communication with the client.
finalOkModal.understandContinue: I understand and want to continue
finalOkModal.errBlocked: Cannot enter FINAL OK. Check blockages.
finalOkModal.block_ALREADY_IN_SAFE: Project is already invoiced (read-only). FINAL OK is not possible.
finalOkModal.block_ALREADY_ARCHIVED: Project is already archived. FINAL OK is not possible.
finalOkModal.block_CANCELLED: Project is cancelled. FINAL OK is not possible.
finalOkModal.warning_ALREADY_FINAL_OK: Project is already in 'Completed' status (FINAL OK).

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Central console
dashboard.kufTitle: Import and posting of incoming invoices (Purchase Ledger)
dashboard.izvjestajiGrafickiTitle: Revenue, costs and profit by year and month
dashboard.profitPageSubtitle: Profit and margin by month / year
dashboard.selectClientHint: Select a client to view the report.
dashboard.ownerAccessTitle: Enter owner password for Fluxa version and extra options
dashboard.noAccess: You don't have access to this page.

scPage.errRequired: Contracting party and working title are required.
scPage.addBudgetToDeal: Add budget to Deal – select layout
scPage.noLayouts: No layouts. Create one in „Create new SC layout”.
scPage.newLayoutTitle: New layout (4×1, add rows as needed)
scPage.clickFieldHint: Click a cell → select item → select color (e.g. yellow=equipment, blue=audio, green=video).
scPage.colorHint: Group by type (e.g. yellow=equipment, blue=audio, green=video).

finance.title: Finance Tools
finance.subtitle: Bank is canonical truth. Business tables are meaning and links.
finance.bankaDesc: Canonical ledger: what happened. Detail shows links to income, payments, costs and fixed.
finance.bankaVsKnjigeDesc: Comparison of statement balance and internal records (income − payments). Check that everything matches.
finance.potrazivanjaDesc: What should be collected (meaning). Detail shows links to income and paid sum view.
finance.naplateDesc: What’s due soon or overdue. Projects status 4/6, unpaid.
finance.pdvPrijavaDesc: Period calculation: output (sales) − input (purchases) = amount to declare. Document list.
finance.kufDesc: Import of incoming invoices and posting: project, fixed, extraordinary, investments.
finance.pocetnaStanjaDesc: Balance sheet as at 31.12.2025 — clients (receivables), suppliers and talents (our payables).
finance.dugovanjaDesc: Obligations to suppliers/talents. List and detail with paid sum.
finance.prihodiDesc: Business income (meaning). Detail shows bank links and links to receivables.
finance.placanjaDesc: Business payments (meaning). Detail shows bank links and line items (if any).
finance.cashflowDesc: Payment timeline — what to pay next. Fixed costs sorted by date.
finance.kreditiDesc: Total amount, number of instalments, paid, remaining debt, last instalment.
finance.fiksniTroskoviDesc: Fixed cost catalogue and due schedule (read-only).
finance.noteText: Some modules are still being extended (linking, rules). Navigation and views are stable.

vat.vatTreatmentHint: Affects VAT calculation only (EU B2B, reverse charge, export)

bankingImport.saveAsRuleHint: Tip: for counterparties use part of name (e.g. "AERO CENTER"), for exchange "EXCH", for internal transfers "TRANSFER".
